data.title: ORIX JREIT Reveals Buyer of Hamamatsu Act Tower as Act Godo Kaisha
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from ORIX JREIT Inc. ( (JP:8954) ) is now available.

ORIX JREIT Inc. has identified Act Godo Kaisha as the previously undisclosed buyer of the Hamamatsu Act Tower property, following consent to release certain details. The buyer, a Japanese limited liability company established in February 2026, engages in real estate acquisition, management, and related activities, and counts SEKISUI HEIM Tokai and The Shizuoka Bank among its major investors, though some financial data remain undisclosed.

ORIX JREIT and its asset manager confirm there are no capital, personal, or business ties with Act Godo Kaisha, and the buyer is not considered a related party under reporting rules. The disclosure clarifies counterparty information for investors while leaving the terms of the original disposition unchanged, and ORIX JREIT states that all other aspects of its March 10, 2026 announcement remain the same.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:8954) stock is a Buy with a Yen114920.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ORIX JREIT Inc. stock, see the JP:8954 Stock Forecast page.

More about ORIX JREIT Inc.

ORIX JREIT Inc. is a Japanese real estate investment trust listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange that invests in income-producing properties. Managed by ORIX Asset Management Corporation, it focuses on acquiring, owning, leasing, and disposing of real estate and related assets to generate stable returns for investors in Japan’s property market.

Average Trading Volume: 12,710

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen550.3B

For an in-depth examination of 8954 stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: ispace to Develop Lunar Communication and Positioning Business with New Satellite Network
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

ispace,inc. ( (JP:9348) ) has issued an update.

ispace has approved plans to explore a new business line called Lunar Connect Services, which will use proprietary lunar orbiting satellites to provide high-speed communication and positioning services for customers operating on the Moon and in lunar orbit. The company intends to deploy at least five lunar orbiting satellites by 2030, with the first satellite targeted for launch as early as 2027 and initial communication services expected by the end of fiscal 2027.

To support the new services, ispace has signed a memorandum of understanding with Japanese telecom provider KDDI to jointly study the operation and use of Earth-based ground stations capable of handling large-capacity Moon-Earth communications. The company, citing internal estimates, sees the market for lunar communication and data services reaching at least $3 billion annually by the 2040s, and views Lunar Connect as a key pillar alongside its existing transportation and data businesses, though the initiative is not expected to affect earnings for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2026.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9348) stock is a Hold with a Yen608.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ispace,inc. stock, see the JP:9348 Stock Forecast page.

More about ispace,inc.

ispace, inc. is a Japan-based space technology company focused on lunar exploration and infrastructure, listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Growth Market. Leveraging its capability to deliver, deploy, and operate spacecraft in lunar orbit, the company provides transportation to the lunar surface and orbit, along with lunar data services, and aims to help build the emerging cislunar economy.

Average Trading Volume: 2,055,626

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: Yen82.75B

For a thorough assessment of 9348 stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Meren Energy Expands Debt Capacity With Refinanced US$600 Million RBL Facility
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Meren Energy ( (TSE:MER) ) is now available.

Meren Energy has refinanced the reserves-based lending facility of its subsidiary, significantly boosting available debt capacity while extending the maturity of its borrowings. The new revolving structure, with a total commitment of US$600 million and an accordion feature up to US$1 billion, is designed to optimize the company’s capital structure and support execution of its business plan.

Under the amended six-year facility, Meren will benefit from slightly lower average borrowing margins, reflecting strong lender appetite and confidence in the quality of its production assets. Upon closing, expected imminently, the company’s RBL capacity will rise to about US$574 million, enhancing financial flexibility for ongoing operations and future growth initiatives across its offshore portfolio.

More about Meren Energy

Meren Energy Inc. is a full-cycle independent upstream oil and gas company with interests in offshore Nigeria, Namibia, South Africa and Equatorial Guinea. Its core producing and development assets are in deepwater Nigeria, and it holds a leading position in the Orange Basin through its effective stake in the Venus light oil project in Namibia and a direct interest in Block 3B/4B offshore South Africa.

data.title: Verisure Posts Another Year of Strong Growth as It Debuts on Nasdaq Stockholm
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Verisure Plc ( (SE:VSURE) ) has issued an announcement.

Verisure plc, the UK-incorporated global leader in professionally monitored security services, has built a dominant position across Europe and Latin America, claiming clear number-one status in 14 of its 18 markets and operating at roughly six times the scale of its nearest competitor by customers served. Its portfolio of technology-enabled, human-delivered security solutions targets residential and small business customers, underpinned by a focus on high service quality, strong retention and sustained growth.

The company published its 2025 annual report, highlighting another year of “balanced, high-quality growth,” continued expansion of its customer base and profitability, and entry into Mexico as its 18th market. The year also marked Verisure’s IPO on Nasdaq Stockholm, broadening its shareholder base, while the firm accelerated innovation through advanced technologies and AI and secured repeat recognition as an ESG leader, reinforcing its growth narrative and stakeholder-focused positioning.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:VSURE) stock is a Buy with a EUR19.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Verisure Plc stock, see the SE:VSURE Stock Forecast page.

More about Verisure Plc

Verisure plc is a UK-incorporated company and the global leader in professionally monitored security services, with a market-leading footprint across Europe and Latin America. The group protects about 6.2 million families and small businesses in 18 countries from intrusions, fire and health emergencies, leveraging over 35 years of experience, advanced technology and a vertically integrated model.

data.title: NAC Co., Ltd. Reshapes Board With New Director Appointments and Resignation
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

NAC Co., Ltd. ( (JP:9788) ) has shared an update.

NAC Co., Ltd. has announced board changes, nominating senior executives Syuji Otsuki and Jiro Ando as new directors to be formally appointed at the June 26, 2026 annual shareholders’ meeting. Otsuki, who leads the CreCla Business Company and also serves as president of CONVEBOX, INC., and Ando, head of the Corporate Division and president of JIMOS Co., Ltd., bring extensive operational and managerial experience from key group businesses.

The company also disclosed that Director and Managing Executive Officer Kazuyoshi Wakimoto, who serves as president and representative director of Good Life Business Support Inc., will resign his directorship at the conclusion of the same shareholders’ meeting. These moves indicate a generational shift in leadership and a consolidation of board representation around core operating units, potentially sharpening NAC’s strategic focus and governance alignment across its main business segments.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9788) stock is a Buy with a Yen598.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on NAC Co., Ltd. stock, see the JP:9788 Stock Forecast page.

More about NAC Co., Ltd.

NAC Co., Ltd. is a Japanese company listed on the TSE Prime Market under securities code 9788. Through businesses such as its CreCla bottled water operation and group subsidiaries including JIMOS Co., Ltd. and Good Life Business Support Inc., it provides consumer-oriented services and products in areas like home-related support and daily living, targeting households across Japan.

Average Trading Volume: 97,728

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen24.61B

data.title: Horiba Weighs Possible Cut to Minimum Trading Unit to Boost Liquidity
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Horiba ( (JP:6856) ) is now available.

Horiba, Ltd. has stated that it views a reduction in the minimum stock trading unit for its shares as an effective way to attract a broader base of investors and enhance liquidity in the market. The company acknowledges that lowering the trading unit could make its stock more accessible, potentially expanding its shareholder base and improving daily trading activity.

At the same time, Horiba is not committing to an immediate change and will continue to monitor equity market trends and its shareholder composition before deciding whether to proceed with a reduction. This stance, disclosed under Tokyo Stock Exchange regulations triggered by its high minimum investment level, signals that any move to lower the trading unit will be carefully timed and conditioned on market and ownership structure developments.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:6856) stock is a Buy with a Yen21945.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Horiba stock, see the JP:6856 Stock Forecast page.

More about Horiba

Horiba, Ltd. is a Japanese company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market under securities code 6856. It operates in the technology and manufacturing sphere, and its shares are widely held enough that its current minimum investment value exceeded 500,000 yen as of December 31, 2025, bringing it under specific Tokyo Stock Exchange disclosure rules.

Average Trading Volume: 201,326

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen779.7B
